summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Verityn news app. Most core functionality works well including onboarding, home feed, story details, and save functionality. Found critical UI overlay issue preventing access to saved articles screen.

ui_bugs.issue: Made with Emergent badge overlaps bottom navigation, intercepting clicks to Saved tab
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot access saved articles screen
ui_bugs.position: Badge positioned at bottom center, blocking navigation buttons

integration_issues.issue: Save functionality works but saved screen inaccessible due to navigation overlay

passed_tests: Home feed loading with proper story display
AI summary badges on top story cards
Story detail view with timeline and AI summary
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Most functionality works but critical navigation issue prevents full workflow completion
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Made with Emergent badge positioning to prevent overlap with bottom navigation. Badge should either be repositioned, have lower z-index, or be made non-interactive to allow users to access saved articles screen.
